About Me

Crafting Intelligent Solutions

I'm Ahmed Obaid Raza, an undergraduate Data Scientist and Full Stack Developer at PAF-IAST, Haripur. I build real-world AI-powered applications and data-driven systems that make a genuine impact. With internship experience at both CodeAlpha (Machine Learning) and Fursan Studio (Full Stack Development), I thrive at the intersection of data science, AI, and modern web technologies.
